Preserve exact product constraints and review outcomes without rereading deleted old-solution context.

project_summary.business_domain: OpenCode plugin for bundling/syncing Gem Team agents and resolving model tiers.
key_features: GitHub-only publish/install target with PoC-gated install mechanics
Built-in synchronized Gem Team agents from upstream
project_summary.current_phase: PRD updated and reviewed after opencode-kimchi feasibility research

tech_stack.name: OpenCode SDK plugin
tech_stack.usage_context: Feasibility route based on kimchi: PluginModule, server hooks, config hook, chat.params

tech_stack.name: TypeScript
tech_stack.usage_context: Likely implementation language inferred from kimchi reference

conventions: Use docs/PRD.md as PRD source of truth.
Use exact gem-* slugs; do not use display-name aliases.
Model priority string must remain exact: OpenCode agent.model > plugin complexity_models[tier] > current OpenCode selected model.
Kimchi references are implementation-shape evidence, not product-scope inheritance.
PRD content is Chinese; final agent outputs may summarize in Chinese unless overridden.

hard: Future context-envelope update tasks may modify only docs/plan/20260603-rewrite-prd-opencode-gem-team-plugin/context_envelope.json unless explicitly instructed otherwise.
Do not restore old方案废弃说明 or old-solution deprecation sections in docs/PRD.md.
Preserve GitHub-only publish/install target while PoC verifies GitHub source syntax, dist requirements, and npm publish avoidance.
Preserve plugin built-in/synced Gem Team agents and upstream orchestrator orchestration.
Preserve model priority OpenCode agent.model > plugin complexity_models[tier] > current selected model.
Forbid per-agent override, agent_complexity_models, role_models, provider-side router, third-party long-term router, standalone auto model.
soft: Keep PRD concise and implementation-route focused.
Patch existing sections rather than rewrite unrelated PRD decisions.
compatibility: OpenCode GitHub source syntax, dist/package requirements, and no-npm-publish path must be verified by PoC before precise install docs.
security_requirements: Do not document or require API keys/tokens/secrets in PRD examples.
Tier resolve metadata must not record secrets or full user content.

purpose: Updated PRD source and review target
why_relevant: Contains kimchi-informed SDK plugin route, updated AC-14/AC-15, PoC checklist, risk table, and preserved product decisions.
Defines required kimchi route, deletion of old方案, GitHub-only caveats, and reviewer checks.

kimchi_feasibility_findings.finding: OpenCode SDK plugin can default export PluginModule { id, server }.
server returns hooks; config hook can dynamically inject agents.
config hook injection can avoid overwriting existing OpenCode agent.model.
chat.params can set the actual request model for resolved complexity tier requests.
Kimchi proves npm package installation shape, not GitHub-only installation for this repo.

patterns_found.name: Old-solution section removed
example_location: docs/PRD.md ends at section 11; no ## 12 old方案 section

external: OpenCode official plugin/config docs for future PoC verification

gotchas.text: Kimchi README proves npm package install only; it does not prove this repo's GitHub-only install syntax.
Do not copy kimchi provider virtual models/profiles/telemetry/slash commands/provider auto-router/context auto-compaction/model fallback chain.
Old方案 content was deleted and must not be reintroduced as a historical or deprecated note.
Hardcoding concrete model IDs in PRD, README, examples, or acceptance criteria violates the product boundary.

open_questions.question: What exact OpenCode GitHub source syntax, dist commitment policy, and package-manager involvement apply?
open_questions.context: Required before final install instructions can be precise.

summary: 新增 kimchi-informed OpenCode SDK 插件路线与可行性说明。
删除旧方案废弃说明章节及引用。
改写 AC-14/AC-15、PoC 清单与风险表，转为正向技术路线和边界要求。
补强 upstream source URL、commit、body/content hash 的同步与校验要求。
保留 GitHub-only 目标但将 GitHub source 语法、dist、无需 npm publish 列为 PoC 验证项。

key_locations.content: GitHub-only 发布/安装目标与 PoC-gated 安装机制声明
GitHub 安装要求与不得 overclaim package manager involvement
上游 agent 同步 metadata: source URL, commit, body/content hash
OpenCode SDK 插件技术路线与 kimchi 参考边界
更新后的验收标准 AC-01 至 AC-22
更新后的风险与缓解表

notes: AC-14 已改为验证 SDK 插件技术路线；AC-15 已明确 kimchi 禁止继承能力。
风险表包含 GitHub 安装机制未实测与 kimchi 参考范围扩张的缓解。

product_decisions_kept.decision: GitHub-only 发布/安装目标保持不变。
product_decisions_kept.caveat: 需要 PoC 验证 OpenCode GitHub source 语法、是否需要提交 dist、以及无需 npm publish 是否足够；PRD 不承诺完全无 package manager involvement。
同步必须保留 slug，并记录 upstream source URL、commit、body/content hash。

product_decisions_kept.decision: OpenCode 加载后必须注册完整 16 个真实 gem-* slug。
product_decisions_kept.caveat: 如上游新增、删除或重命名，需通过同步校验暴露差异并更新 PRD 与注册清单。

product_decisions_kept.decision: gem-orchestrator 是入口 agent，且不得路由到自身。
product_decisions_kept.caveat: 插件不重写上游 orchestration framework。
reasoning-critical roles 只能作为 tier hints，不得成为 role_models 或 per-agent overrides。

product_decisions_kept.decision: 模型优先级保持 OpenCode agent.model > plugin complexity_models[tier] > current selected model。
product_decisions_kept.caveat: config hook 注入和 chat.params 设置都必须尊重 OpenCode 原生 agent.model 最高优先级。

patterns: Positive constraints replace deprecated old-solution notes

tasks.title: Rewrite PRD with kimchi-informed plugin route

tasks.title: Review PRD for feasibility-route accuracy and decision preservation

patterns.name: SDK hook-limited reuse
patterns.description: Use opencode-kimchi only to validate OpenCode SDK plugin mechanics: PluginModule default export, server hooks, config injection, and chat.params request mutation.

patterns.name: PoC-gated install claims
patterns.description: When external reference proves npm package installation but product requires GitHub-only, PRD should keep the target and require PoC verification instead of overclaiming mechanics.

patterns.name: Positive replacement for deprecated routes
patterns.description: Delete legacy old方案 sections and restate current boundaries as direct requirements, acceptance checks, and risks.

gotchas: Kimchi cannot prove GitHub-only installation; it only supports feasibility of SDK plugin mechanics and npm package install shape.
Do not convert kimchi provider features into positive product requirements for this Gem Team plugin.
Do not reintroduce model fallback chains beyond current OpenCode selected model fallback.
Do not let reasoning-critical roles become model configuration dimensions.

facts.statement: docs/PRD.md now contains section 5.7 for OpenCode SDK plugin technical route and kimchi reference boundaries.
docs/PRD.md acceptance criteria include AC-14 for PluginModule/server/config/chat.params route and AC-15 for kimchi boundary exclusions.
Review result passed with no blocking findings and warnings=[].
Hash requirement is satisfied by upstream source URL, commit, and body/content hash requirements in sync and validation sections.

failure_modes.scenario: Implementation copies kimchi provider/product features instead of only SDK mechanics.
symptoms: provider virtual models appear as requirements
slash commands or provider auto-router become core scope
failure_modes.mitigation: Use docs/PRD.md 5.7, 9, 10, and 11 as boundary checks; reject these as non-goals.

failure_modes.scenario: Installation docs overstate GitHub-only as proven zero package-manager involvement.
symptoms: docs claim exact GitHub source syntax before PoC
docs claim no package manager involvement without evidence
failure_modes.mitigation: Run PoC to verify source syntax, dist needs, and npm publish avoidance before publishing install docs.

symptoms: plugin complexity tier overrides OpenCode agent.model
hardcoded concrete model IDs appear in examples
failure_modes.mitigation: Enforce exact priority chain and search docs/examples for forbidden model IDs and config dimensions.

decisions.decision: Keep GitHub-only target but require PoC verification for source syntax, dist, and no npm publish path.
Use opencode-kimchi as feasibility reference only for OpenCode SDK plugin hooks and chat.params.
rationale: Kimchi provider features would expand product scope incorrectly.

decisions.decision: Delete old方案 PRD section and references rather than keeping a deprecation note.
rationale: User explicitly said old方案 can be deleted.
Review confirmed legacy references not found.

conventions: Future PRD changes must cite upstream source URL, commit, and body/content hash requirements when discussing synced agents.
Future docs must use the exact model priority string and exact complexity_models.simple|medium|complex keys.
Future implementation docs must distinguish GitHub-only release target from unverified install mechanics until PoC completes.
